entry.title: Mission Accomplished: the BIG GAME 53 Recap
entry.summary:
What an absolutely incredible weekend we just had! From Friday to Sunday, the BIG GAME 53 was in full swing, and we're still buzzing from the energy, the laughs, and of course, the epic gaming that unfolded - that Q3 finale was something else, what a comeback!

It was fantastic to see so many of you there, from our seasoned veterans who've been with us for countless events to the awesome new faces who joined the "BIG GAME" family for the first time. The hall was alive with the sound of cheers (and a few frustrated groans at the Trackmania, let's be honest!), as you all dove into a fantastic mix of games, both classic favourites and the latest titles.
entry.content:
What an absolutely incredible weekend we just had! From Friday to Sunday, the BIG GAME 53 was in full swing, and we're still buzzing from the energy, the laughs, and of course, the epic gaming that unfolded - that Q3 finale was something else, what a comeback!

It was fantastic to see so many of you there, from our seasoned veterans who've been with us for countless events to the awesome new faces who joined the "BIG GAME" family for the first time. The hall was alive with the sound of cheers (and a few frustrated groans at the Trackmania, let's be honest!), as you all dove into a fantastic mix of games, both classic favourites and the latest titles.

We witnessed some truly nail-biting matches, incredible teamwork, and some seriously impressive individual skill. The atmosphere was electric, a testament to the amazing community you all create EVERY-SINGLE-EVENT.

 A massive congratulations to Moggy, who battled it out against fierce competition to claim the highly coveted title of "BIG GAMER 53"! Moggy truly proved himself "best of the rest" and walked away with the title "BIG GAMER 53" (straight on linkedin, I'm sure) and the brilliant Steam vouchers courtesy of Mark One Consultants, our brilliant sponsors. Well played, Moggy!

A huge, heartfelt thank you to every single one of you who attended "the BIG GAME 53". Your enthusiasm, sportsmanship, and passion for PC gaming are what make these events so special. We couldn't do it without you!

Stay tuned for details on our next event. We can't wait to see you all again for more gaming madness!

entry.title: tBG53 is underway!
entry.summary: Wow, what an atmosphere here at the BIG GAME 53! As I write this, the energy in the room is absolutely electric. We've got over 70 gamers plugged in, focused, and totally immersed in their virtual worlds, and it's truly a sight to behold.
entry.content:
Wow, what an atmosphere here at the BIG GAME 53! As I write this, the energy in the room is absolutely electric. We've got over 70 gamers plugged in, focused, and totally immersed in their virtual worlds, and it's truly a sight to behold.

From the moment the doors opened, you could feel the buzz. The familiar hum of cooling fans, the click-clack of mechanical keyboards, and the occasional triumphant shout (or commiserating groan!) are the soundtrack to another fantastic event. It's awesome to see so many familiar faces, along with some new ones, all coming together for what we do best: pure, unadulterated gaming fun.

Everywhere you look, there's action. Whether it's intense FPS showdowns, strategic RTS battles, cooperative survival adventures, or even some classic retro gaming, everyone's found their groove. The camaraderie is palpable – friends are teaming up, rivals are battling it out, and new connections are being forged over shared victories and close calls.

This is what the BIG GAME is all about. It's more than just a place to play games; it's a community. It's about disconnecting from the everyday and plugging into a world where your only concern is that next headshot, that perfect build order, or finally beating that challenging boss.

We're incredibly proud to be hosting our 53rd event, and it's thanks to all of you, our amazing attendees, that we keep going from strength to strength. The dedication, enthusiasm, and sheer passion for gaming that fills this room are what make "the BIG GAME" truly special.

So, here's to everyone who's part of the BIG GAME 53 right now. Keep those screens lit, those mice gripped, and those headsets on. We're having an absolute blast, and we hope you are too!

entry.title: tBG53: THIS WEEKEND!
entry.summary:
The countdown to the BIG GAME is officially on, and we're buzzing with excitement to see you all this coming weekend! Get ready for an epic weekend of gaming, good food, and great company.

Here's some crucial info to ensure you're all set for the event:
entry.content:
The countdown to the BIG GAME is officially on, and we're buzzing with excitement to see you all this coming weekend! Get ready for an epic weekend of gaming, good food, and great company.

Here's some crucial info to ensure you're all set for the event:

Camping at the BIG GAME

Planning to pitch a tent and stay onsite? Awesome! Please make sure you register for camping via the "Manage Your Booking" section on our Ticket Tailor page. Registering helps us get an accurate headcount and ensures there's plenty of space for everyone.

Door Open Times & New Venue

Mark your calendars! Doors open at 18:00 on Friday, July 4th. If you arrive a bit early, you can access the cafe for refreshments and snacks starting from 17:00 while you wait.

Please note our NEW VENUE ADDRESS: Havant RFC, PO9 3EJ - Make sure you head to the right place!

Friday Night Curry: Don't Miss Out!

Forget about cooking on Friday night and join us for our delicious Friday night curry! For just £12 per person, you'll get a mild chicken (or vegetable) curry, fluffy rice, crispy poppadoms, and a warm, soft naan. It's the perfect way to fuel up for a weekend of gaming without any hassle.

To ensure we have enough food for everyone, please pre-order your curry within the next 24 hours via this link.

And for those wondering about Saturday, we'll also have pizza available to keep you fueled!

Quick Reminder of the Ground Rules

To ensure everyone has a fantastic and safe time, here are a couple of important reminders:

  • Be excellent to each other! Let's keep the atmosphere friendly and respectful for all attendees.
  • The venue is a licensed premises, which means NO external alcohol is permitted. Please respect this rule.

We can't wait to see you all for the BIG GAME! Get your rigs ready and prepare for an unforgettable weekend.

See you there!

entry.title: Friday Night Feast: Curry Night at tBG53!
entry.summary:
Get ready, tBG53 attendees, because we're kicking off our 53rd event with a delicious new tradition! This Friday night (July 4th), we're inviting everyone to join us for a fantastic curry feast right here at the tBG53.

After you've set up your rig and started getting into the gaming zone, you won't need to worry about dinner. We're serving up a spread that's sure to satisfy those pre-gaming hunger pangs!
entry.content:
Get ready, tBG53 attendees, because we're kicking off our 53rd event with a delicious new tradition! This Friday night (July 4th), we're inviting everyone to join us for a fantastic curry feast right here at the tBG53.

After you've set up your rig and started getting into the gaming zone, you won't need to worry about dinner. We're serving up a spread that's sure to satisfy those pre-gaming hunger pangs!

For just £12 per person, you'll get:

  • Your choice of chicken curry or a delicious vegetable curry
  • Fluffy rice
  • Crispy poppadoms
  • Warm and soft Naan breads
  • A selection of tasty sauces

We'll make sure there's more than enough for everyone to enjoy a bit of everything. It's the perfect way to fuel up for a weekend of intense gaming and great company.

You can order your Friday night curry here <----
(Curry orders close on Friday 29th June)

So, get ready to game, but first, get ready to feast! We can't wait to see you there!

entry.title: We've got a new recruit! ??
entry.summary:
BIG NEWS EVERYONE, for the first time in over a decade, we've got a new recruit! ??

We're thrilled to announce that Vale has joined the tBG crew!  Vale's IT prowess is like a cheat code for our events. From optimized event and network setups to lightning-fast load times, Vale's expertise will level up the tBG experience for all attendees.
entry.content:
BIG NEWS EVERYONE, for the first time in over a decade, we've got a new recruit! ??

We're thrilled to announce that Vale has joined the tBG crew!  Vale's IT prowess is like a cheat code for our events. From optimized event and network setups to lightning-fast load times, Vale's expertise will level up the tBG experience for all attendees.

Vale is a BIG GAME veteran, having attended his first event over 20 years ago, and has racked up more than a few frags (and pints) in that time. His understanding and passion for tBG means he is ideally placed to support the continued development of the event in line with our community roots and social objectives.

Join us in giving Vale a pat on the back and welcoming him to the Crew!

We look forward to seeing you all at tBG53 in July 2025! ?️

entry.title: Tickets Now Available for tBG53: The BIG GAME 53
entry.summary:
Get ready to level up your gaming experience at tBG53 - Book your tickets here!

 Tickets for the highly anticipated LAN party gaming event, tBG53, are now available. Mark your calendars for July 4-6, 2025, as we gather to celebrate gaming, community, and friendly competition!
entry.content:
Get ready to level up your gaming experience at tBG53 - Book your tickets here!

 Tickets for the highly anticipated LAN party gaming event, tBG53, are now available. Mark your calendars for July 4-6, 2025, as we gather to celebrate gaming, community, and friendly competition!

 Whether you're a seasoned LAN Party goer or just starting your gaming journey, tBG53 offers something for everyone. Immerse yourself in a world of non-stop gaming, connect with like-minded individuals, and experience the thrill of LAN party culture.

 Don't miss out on this epic event! Grab your tickets now and secure your spot at tBG53.

 Book your tickets today!

 We look forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Tickets for tBG53 - Live on Friday!
entry.summary:
We're thrilled to announce that tickets for BIG GAME 53, our 53rd annual LAN party, will go on sale this Friday, October 11th. This year's event promises to be bigger and better than ever, with a packed schedule of tournaments, competitions, and non-stop gaming fun.

Get your tickets here
entry.content:
We're thrilled to announce that tickets for BIG GAME 53, our 53rd annual LAN party, will go on sale this Friday, October 11th. This year's event promises to be bigger and better than ever, with a packed schedule of tournaments, competitions, and non-stop gaming fun.

Get your tickets here

What to expect at BIG GAME 53:

Epic tournaments: Compete against the best gamers for bragging rights, BIG GAMER title and prizes.

Non-stop gaming: Enjoy a variety of games, from classic titles to the latest releases.

Social atmosphere: Connect with fellow gamers, make new friends, and share your passion.

Food and drinks: Fuel up with delicious food and refreshing drinks throughout the event.

Don't miss out, be part of gaming history. Mark your calendars and get ready to grab your tickets when they go live on Friday, October 11th.

Stay tuned for more updates on BIG GAME 53!

entry.title: Mark One Levels Up! They're Back for The BIG GAME 2025!
entry.summary: Get ready to frag, farm, and dominate, because the BIG GAME is gearing up for another epic year of LAN party action, and we're thrilled to announce that our awesome sponsor, Mark One, is joining the fray once again!
entry.content:
Get ready to frag, farm, and dominate, because the BIG GAME is gearing up for another epic year of LAN party action, and we're thrilled to announce that our awesome sponsor, Mark One, is joining the fray once again!

That's right, folks, Mark One (https://markone.co.uk/) continues their long-standing support of the BIG GAME in to 2025! Their continued support means that gamers of all levels can expect top-notch equipment, support, incredible prizes, and an unforgettable weekend of competitive fun.

A Huge Thank You to Mark One

We at The BIG GAME want to extend a massive thank you to the team at Mark One. Their dedication to the gaming community is truly inspiring, and their support allows us to create a truly special experience for all attendees.

entry.title: Get Ready for tBG53: 4th-6th July 2025!
entry.summary: In the event that the world is still intact and hasn't succumbed to a global thermonuclear war or a zombie apocalypse by July 2025, we're thrilled to announce the return of the BIG GAME for 'tBG53', set to take place on 4-6th July 2025 at our new home, Havant Rugby Club.
entry.content:
In the event that the world is still intact and hasn't succumbed to a global thermonuclear war or a zombie apocalypse by July 2025, we're thrilled to announce the return of the BIG GAME for 'tBG53', set to take place on 4-6th July 2025 at our new home, Havant Rugby Club. 

That's right, folks. Even if we're all living in a fallout shelter, surrounded by irradiated mutants and scavenging for canned food, we've got your gaming needs covered! Join us for three days of intense fun, LAN antics, competition, epic matches, pub quiz and pizza - everything tBG is renown for! 

Whether we're playing in a post-apocalyptic wasteland or a peaceful oasis, The BIG GAME 53 will be the ultimate escape.

Tickets will be available starting Friday, 11th October - Available here

So, grab your Geiger counter, dust off the skeletonised corpse of your teammate, and get ready to dominate. 

Just remember, if you see something glowing, it'll most likely be a friendly monster-energy-fueled gamer, not a radioactive monster! 

Disclaimer: This press release is purely satirical and does not reflect any actual plans for a nuclear-powered LAN party (though we could really do with the power, to be honest) or a post-apocalyptic gaming event.

entry.title: tBG52 Gallery online
entry.summary: All the images from tBG52 are now online, check them out on our Flickr album or via this link!
entry.content: All the images from tBG52 are now online, check them out on our Flickr album or via this link!
